title: Simple Chat App with Avatar

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Simple Chat App with Avatar

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <!-- Background Gradient -->
  <linearGradient id='background' x1='0%' x2='100%' y1='0%' y2='0%'>
    <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#B7D7CD'/>
    <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#C06C88'/>
  </linearGradient>
  <rect x='50' y='50' rx='10' width='300' height='200' fill='url(#background)'/>
  <!-- User Avatar -->
  <circle cx='100' cy='150' r='50' fill='#411C56'/>
  <!-- Input Field -->
  <rect x='100' y='220' width='200' height='40' fill='#ffffff' rx='10'/>
  <!-- Chat Messages -->
  <g transform='translate(110, 270)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='280' height='100' fill='#ffffff' rx='10'/>
    <text x='10' y='20' font-size='16' fill='#000000'>Message 1</text>
    <text x='10' y='50' font-size='16' fill='#000000'>Message 2</text>
    <text x='10' y='80' font-size='16' fill='#000000'>Message 3</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Scrollbar -->
  <rect x='310' y='270' width='10' height='100' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Input field should have a placeholder text 'Type a message...'
Chat messages should be centered and scrollable

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Simple Chat App with Avatar

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify input field placeholder text, chat messages list scrolling, and basic typing functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
